doubleEscapeCommand.description: Optional extension command name to invoke on empty-editor double-escape. Accepts either 'anycopy' or '/anycopy'.

commandRemap.description: Map of submitted slash command names to replacement command names. Keys and values may include a leading '/'; runtime normalization trims whitespace and strips the slash.

respectGitignore.description: Hide files ignored by .gitignore when browsing.

skipHidden.description: Hide dotfiles and hidden directories in the picker.

allowFolderSelection.description: Allow folders to be queued and inserted as @path/ refs.

skipPatterns.description: Directory or file name patterns skipped by the picker.

tabCompletionMode.description: How Tab completes file-picker queries. 'segment' advances one path segment at a time; 'bestMatch' replaces the query with the strongest scoped fuzzy match.

previewHighlightMode.description: How the preview pane highlights source code. 'native' uses the local syntect addon with builtin fallback; 'builtin' always uses Pi's JS highlighter.
